CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-01-2021 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-18-2020 Continued To Apr-14-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Petition And Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings; Memorandum In Support
Off Calendar Aug-20-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT INDUS HOLDING COMPANY's Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings: A statement of no opposition was filed. The motion is granted.

Counsel for the moving party is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Curtis E Karnow, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/CEK)
